report.title: Simple Location List 2
report.description: Used by the Dynamic Location Form to retrieve the locations associated with a website and user.
report.query: SELECT l.id, l.name, l.centroid_sref, (select count(*) from samples s where s.location_id = l.id and s.deleted = FALSE) as num_samples, CASE WHEN CAST(l.created_by_id AS character varying)='#iUserID#' THEN true ELSE false END as editable FROM locations l JOIN locations_websites lw on lw.location_id = l.id and lw.deleted = false WHERE (#ownData#=0 OR CAST(l.created_by_id AS character varying)='#iUserID#') AND l.deleted = FALSE AND lw.website_id = '#website_id#' #order_by#

param.name: website_id
param.description: Select the website to return data for?
param.query: SELECT id, title as caption FROM websites

param.name: iUserID
param.description: Something has gone wrong as you are logged in to the system but do not have an ID

param.name: location_type_id
param.description: Select the location type, or leave blank to not filter by location type.

param.name: parent_id
param.description: ID of the parent site to filter by or leave blank to not filter by parent ID.
